# designedbyomar

> Portfolio site for Omar Tavarez, a product designer focused on AI workflows, design systems, fintech, healthcare SaaS, and enterprise product strategy.

Site: https://www.designedbyomar.com/
Contact: omar@designedbyomar.com

## Primary pages
- / : homepage, background, selected work, contact
- /work : selected work and case studies
- /work/mgmt-portal/ : Management Portal case study
- /work/posting-asst/ : Posting Assistant case study
- /work/page-builder/ : Page Builder 2.0 case study
- /work/connect-api/ : Connect API Payments case study
- /work/athena-ds/ : Athena Design System 2.0 case study
- /work/plastiq-mktg/ : Plastiq Marketing Site case study
- /work/disney-cct/ : Critical Communication Tool case study
- /work/disney-uap/ : Unified Ad Platform case study
- /design-system : public design system, brand, token, component, pattern, motion, content, and accessibility reference
- /privacy : privacy policy and data collection details

## Topics
- product design
- design systems
- AI workflows
- fintech
- healthcare SaaS
- enterprise UX

## Notes
- All case studies are available at stable, crawlable URLs.
- Indexing, summarization, and citation are allowed.
- Training, bulk reuse, or republication beyond normal citation requires explicit written permission.
